This is not a flat illustration but a high-completion 3D CG character render with exquisite character modeling, realistic material performance, cinematic lighting, magnificent costume dynamics, and premium virtual character poster quality. The gaze is calm, sharp, and carries a slight sense of pressure and detachment. Long eyelashes, cool and restrained eye makeup, a tall nose, and exquisite lip lines with low-saturation cold rose red color. The expression is calm yet majestic.

The hairstyle is a high bun combined with ultra-long black hair. The main hair color is deep black with cold blue highlights. The hair strands are extremely voluminous and smooth, with the ends fluttering widely in the air to create strong dynamics. The bun on top is stable and magnificent, with fine forehead and side hair drifting around. Wearing an exquisite oriental fantasy metal crown integrating gold, silver, fine gems, and leaf patterns, showing advanced classical craftsmanship. The long hair and several black smoke-like ribbons spiral in the air, creating a strong sense of elegance and power.

The costume is a high-precision 3D CG oriental fantasy battle attire, primarily in dark purple, royal blue, ice blue, ink black, and cold white gradients with rich layering. The inner layer is a close-fitting dark high-collared or cross-collared long dress with hidden patterns, gold embroidery, and cloud motifs. The outer layer is covered with semi-transparent light gauze long sleeves and large floating silk ribbons. Shoulder, chest, cuffs, and collar feature exquisite metal guards, jewelry inlays, and embroidery, combining immortal air with a sense of battle. Materials include silk, gauze, brocade, metal, and embroidery with realistic PBR performance. The composition highlights the face, shoulders, neck, costume structure, crown, hair dynamics, and ribbon layers.

The character holds a magnificent oriental longsword with a long, straight blade and sharp metallic cold light. The hilt and handguard feature classical carvings and gold patterns. The character holds the sword steadily, with the blade cutting in diagonally from the bottom or side, enhancing the sense of pressure and control. The other hand naturally falls outside the frame or lightly touches the robe. The body is slightly turned, shoulders and neck extended, posture upright and elegant. The composition focuses on the head, chest, shoulders, partial arms, hilt, and ribbon dynamics, creating a close-up sense of pressure and high-end character poster atmosphere.

The scene is a moonlit oriental fantasy space with a huge cold white full moon in the center behind the character. Surrounded by black smoke-like energy, ink-colored branch shadows, and semi-transparent mist, like a space where ink wash and spiritual energy merge. A small amount of red ribbons and pink petals float in the air, creating cold-warm contrast and poetic tension. The background is minimalist and high-end, highlighting the character.

Lighting uses cinematic cold white main light combined with soft moonlight backlighting. The face is clear and transparent, with delicate rim lighting on the hair, shoulders, blade, and ribbon edges. Metallic crown, embroidery, jewelry, silk, gauze, and sword all have realistic material feedback. The overall tone is cold white, gray-blue, deep purple, royal blue, and ink black, with small red and pink accents. The image is magnificent, clean, transparent, ethereal, and refined, with the quality of a high-end collectible 3D CG oriental fantasy character poster.
